dict.string: Sweeply uses your contacts to quickly import client details when adding a new client.
Sweeply uses Face ID to keep your business data secure.
Sweeply can sync your scheduled jobs to your iOS Calendar so you never miss an appointment.
Sweeply adds your scheduled cleaning jobs to your calendar.
Sweeply uses your microphone so you can dictate messages to the AI assistant.
Sweeply uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice into text for the AI assistant.
